abilities.description: Target opponent reveals a card at random from their hand. Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the revealed card's mana value. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Target opponent reveals a card at random from their hand. Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the revealed card's mana value. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: Reveal
